speaker: MATT
raw_text: He fired, and then ducked up there. I need everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, cool!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, this is a cute house!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I can't see inside of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Moving the top floor off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's crates of apples!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a sack of something in the corner! Oh my god, how are we all going to fit in there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sprigg is currently unconscious on the ground there. Percival was there talking. Trinket is off to the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket! Where's the imp?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The imp is not currently visible. Pike would be over on the side here. Keyleth, Vax, where would you guys see yourselves right now? Actually, tell me where you would be. I think that's what I'm trying to ask.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would be right next to Keyleth because I was holding her hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As I chuck you onto the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's all right. It's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, comes back in a day later. All right, cool. So you're there holding that. Scanlan, where would you be?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Near Sprigg-ish.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so I'll put you right there next to the scroll in the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And Matt? Could you touch on the map where the bad man touched you? No, where the bad floorboard is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, actually, I can do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: None of you know this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: None of you know this, except for you, which is actually why I'm not going to show you. You know how to avoid it, but nobody else knows where it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Where is the front door?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The front door is right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There, over by Grog on your right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: These trees need to move.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know, these trees are a pain in our butts. Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's cloaked men everywhere

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as one that was up in the stairs vanishes up top.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, he actually made it upstairs?
